---
title: "Expedições"
subtitle: "Mapa das expedições realizadas durante o projeto Tsiino Hiiwiida"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  eval: true
  freeze: auto
  cache: false
  warning: false
  message: false
resources:
  - ../figures/
  - ../figures/brand/
  - ../_input_data/
  - ../_input_data/expedicoes_fotos/
  - ../_input_data/limites/
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

find_up <- function(rel_path, start = getwd(), max_levels = 8) {
  d <- normalizePath(start, winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)
  for (i in 0:max_levels) {
    cand <- file.path(d, rel_path)
    if (file.exists(cand)) return(cand)
    parent <- dirname(d)
    if (identical(parent, d)) break
    d <- parent
  }
  NA_character_
}

pick_col <- function(data, candidates, required = TRUE, label = NULL) {
  hit <- intersect(candidates, names(data))
  if (length(hit) > 0) return(hit[1])
  if (required) {
    stop(
      "Não encontrei a coluna ", ifelse(is.null(label), paste(candidates, collapse = "/"), label), ".\n",
      "Colunas disponíveis no input: ", paste(names(data), collapse = ", ")
    )
  }
  NA_character_
}

to_num <- function(x) {
  if (is.numeric(x)) return(x)
  suppressWarnings(as.numeric(gsub(",", ".", trimws(as.character(x)))))
}

nz <- function(x) {
  !is.na(x) & nzchar(trimws(as.character(x)))
}

safe_html <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x[is.na(x) | trimws(x) == ""] <- "—"
  htmltools::htmlEscape(x)
}

slugify <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x[is.na(x) | trimws(x) == ""] <- "expedicao"
  x <- iconv(x, from = "UTF-8", to = "ASCII//TRANSLIT")
  x <- tolower(x)
  x <- gsub("[^a-z0-9]+", "-", x)
  x <- gsub("(^-+|-+$)", "", x)
  x[x == ""] <- "expedicao"
  make.unique(x, sep = "-")
}

# Helpers for browser-side translation attributes in HTML generated by R
i18n_attr <- function(key) {
  paste0(" data-i18n=\'", key, "\'")
}

i18n_alt_attr <- function(key) {
  paste0(" data-i18n-alt=\'", key, "\'")
}
```

```{=html}
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Montserrat:wght@400;500;600;700;800;900&family=Source+Serif+4:opsz,wght@8..60,400;8..60,600;8..60,700&family=Space+Mono:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

<style>
  :root{
    --red: #A93632;
    --red-dark: #6E1F1D;
    --green: #626A38;
    --green-map: #59602F;
    --green-dark: #2E3B24;
    --green-soft: #D7DDC5;
    --ochre: #D99A27;
    --cream: #F6F1E8;
    --paper: #FFFDF7;
    --ink: #171717;
    --muted: #675F55;
    --line: rgba(98,106,56,0.24);
  }

  *{
    box-sizing: border-box;
  }

  html{
    scroll-behavior: smooth;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    margin-top: 0 !important;
    padding-top: 0 !important;
  }

  body{
    overflow-x: hidden;
    margin-top: 0 !important;
    padding-top: 0 !important;
    background:
      linear-gradient(rgba(246,241,232,0.88), rgba(246,241,232,0.88)),
      url("../figures/tsiino_bg.png");
    background-repeat: no-repeat;
    background-size: cover;
    background-attachment: fixed;
    background-position: center top;
    font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
    color: var(--ink);
  }

  body.nav-fixed{
    margin-top: 0 !important;
    padding-top: 0 !important;
  }

  #quarto-content,
  .page-columns,
  .page-layout-full,
  main.content,
  main,
  .content{
    width: 100%;
    background: transparent !important;
    margin-top: 0 !important;
    padding-top: 0 !important;
  }

  main.content{
    padding-bottom: 3.5rem;
  }

  .quarto-title-block{
    display: none !important;
  }

  /* NAVBAR SOBRE HERO — MESMA LÓGICA DA PÁGINA SOBRE */

  #quarto-header{
    position: absolute !important;
    top: 0 !important;
    left: 0 !important;
    right: 0 !important;
    z-index: 10000 !important;
    background: transparent !important;
    border: 0 !important;
    box-shadow: none !important;
  }

  #quarto-header .navbar{
    position: relative !important;
    top: 0 !important;
    margin-top: 0 !important;
    background: transparent !important;
    box-shadow: none !important;
    border: 0 !important;
    border-bottom: 0 !important;
    min-height: 76px;
    backdrop-filter: none !important;
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: none !important;
  }

  #quarto-header::before{
    content: "";
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0 0 auto 0;
    height: 120px;
    background: linear-gradient(
      180deg,
      rgba(0,0,0,0.44) 0%,
      rgba(0,0,0,0.20) 58%,
      rgba(0,0,0,0) 100%
    );
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: -1;
  }

  #quarto-header .navbar-brand{
    display: none !important;
  }

  #quarto-header .navbar .nav-link,
  #quarto-header .navbar .nav-link:visited{
    color: #fff !important;
    font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
    text-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.72);
  }

  #quarto-header .navbar .nav-link.active,
  #quarto-header .navbar .nav-link:hover{
    color: var(--ochre) !important;
  }

  #quarto-header .navbar svg,
  #quarto-header .navbar i,
  #quarto-header .navbar .bi,
  #quarto-header .quarto-navbar-tools a,
  #quarto-header .quarto-navbar-tools button,
  #quarto-header .aa-DetachedSearchButton,
  #quarto-header .aa-DetachedSearchButtonIcon,
  #quarto-header .quarto-color-scheme-toggle{
    color: #fff !important;
    fill: #fff !important;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.55));
  }

  /* HERO DE SUBPÁGINA */

  .page-hero{
    position: relative;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    width: 100vw;
    min-height: min(72vh, 720px);
    margin: 0 !important;
    padding: 0 !important;
    overflow: hidden;
    isolation: isolate;
    background-size: cover;
    background-position: center center;
    box-shadow: none;
  }

  .page-hero-expeditions{
    background-image:
      linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.78) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.48) 45%, rgba(0,0,0,0.12) 100%),
      linear-gradient(rgba(110,31,29,0.58), rgba(110,31,29,0.58)),
      url("../figures/tsiino_bg.png");
  }

  .page-hero-overlay{
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    z-index: -2;
    background:
      linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.74) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.48) 44%, rgba(0,0,0,0.12) 100%),
      linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.10) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.22) 52%, rgba(0,0,0,0.72) 100%);
  }

  .page-hero-logo{
    position: absolute;
    top: clamp(5.2rem, 9vw, 7rem);
    left: clamp(1.5rem, 3.5vw, 2.5rem);
    width: clamp(82px, 7vw, 120px);
    z-index: 5;
  }

  .page-hero-logo img{
    width: 100%;
    height: auto;
    display: block;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 8px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.35));
  }

  .page-hero-content{
    position: absolute;
    left: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 5rem);
    top: clamp(13.5rem, 30vh, 17rem);
    width: min(880px, calc(100% - 4rem));
    color: #fff;
    z-index: 4;
  }

  .hero-kicker{
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: clamp(0.68rem, 1vw, 0.82rem);
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.13em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--ochre);
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    text-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.65);
  }

  .page-hero-content h1{
    margin: 0;
    color: #fff;
    font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
    font-size: clamp(3.2rem, 7vw, 6.2rem);
    line-height: 0.9;
    font-weight: 900;
    letter-spacing: -0.07em;
    text-shadow: 0 3px 26px rgba(0,0,0,0.75);
  }

  .hero-subtitle{
    margin: 1rem 0 0 0 !important;
    color: #F6F1E8 !important;
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace !important;
    font-size: clamp(0.78rem, 1.45vw, 1.05rem) !important;
    font-weight: 700 !important;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    line-height: 1.45 !important;
    text-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.70);
  }

  .hero-description{
    margin: 0.9rem 0 0 0 !important;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.92) !important;
    font-size: clamp(1rem, 1.6vw, 1.25rem) !important;
    line-height: 1.58 !important;
    max-width: 760px;
    text-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.68);
  }

  .hero-actions{
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 0.65rem;
    margin-top: 1.25rem;
  }

  .btn-main,
  .btn-ghost{
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 0.45rem;
    padding: 0.68rem 1.05rem;
    border-radius: 999px;
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    text-decoration: none !important;
    transition: transform 0.18s ease, box-shadow 0.18s ease, background 0.18s ease;
  }

  .btn-main{
    background: var(--red);
    color: #fff !important;
    box-shadow: 0 8px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.28);
  }

  .btn-ghost{
    background: rgba(246,241,232,0.90);
    color: var(--green-dark) !important;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.72);
  }

  .btn-main:hover,
  .btn-ghost:hover{
    transform: translateY(-1px);
    box-shadow: 0 10px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.24);
  }

  /* CARDS E TIPOGRAFIA BASE */

  .content-card{
    width: min(1120px, calc(100vw - 2rem));
    margin: 2.6rem auto 0 auto;
    padding: clamp(1.35rem, 3vw, 2.35rem);
    background: rgba(255,253,247,0.96);
    box-shadow: 0 15px 34px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    border-top: 5px solid var(--green);
    border-radius: 0;
  }

  .section-title{
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 96px 1fr;
    gap: 0.75rem;
    align-items: center;
    margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
  }

  .section-title::before{
    content: "";
    display: block;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--ink);
  }

  .section-title h2{
    margin: 0;
    padding-bottom: 0.45rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.18);
    font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
    font-size: clamp(1.2rem, 2.6vw, 1.85rem);
    font-weight: 800;
    color: var(--red);
    letter-spacing: 0.01em;
  }

  .content-card p{
    font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.98rem;
    line-height: 1.72;
    color: var(--ink);
    margin: 0 0 1rem 0;
  }

  .lead,
  .map-lead{
    font-family: 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif !important;
    font-size: clamp(1.08rem, 2vw, 1.26rem) !important;
    line-height: 1.72 !important;
    color: #191711 !important;
    border-left: 4px solid var(--ochre);
    padding-left: 1rem;
    margin-bottom: 1.3rem !important;
  }

  .bg-window{
    width: 100%;
    height: 3.2rem;
  }

  /* LEAFLET */

  .leaflet-container{
    border-radius: 16px;
    overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow: 0 16px 34px rgba(0,0,0,0.16);
    font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
    border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.22);
  }

  .leaflet-control,
  .leaflet-bar,
  .leaflet-control-layers{
    border-radius: 12px !important;
    box-shadow: 0 10px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.14) !important;
    border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.28) !important;
    background: rgba(255,253,247,0.96) !important;
  }

  .leaflet-bar a{
    border-radius: 10px !important;
    color: var(--green-dark) !important;
  }

  .leaflet-popup-content-wrapper{
    border-radius: 14px !important;
    background: rgba(255,253,247,0.99) !important;
    border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.24) !important;
    box-shadow: 0 14px 26px rgba(0,0,0,0.16) !important;
  }

  .leaflet-popup-tip{
    background: rgba(255,253,247,0.99) !important;
  }

  .map-logo{
    width: 92px;
    padding: 8px;
    background: rgba(255,253,247,0.92);
    border-radius: 14px;
    box-shadow: 0 10px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.28);
  }

  .map-logo img{
    display: block;
    width: 100%;
    height: auto;
  }

  .popup-card{
    max-width: 350px;
  }

  .popup-title{
    font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
    font-weight: 800;
    font-size: 1.05rem;
    color: var(--green-dark);
    margin: 0 0 0.25rem 0;
  }

  .popup-sub{
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.70rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--red);
    margin-bottom: 0.55rem;
    font-weight: 700;
  }

  .popup-table{
    width: 100%;
    border-collapse: collapse;
    font-size: 0.90rem;
  }

  .popup-table td{
    padding: 0.22rem 0;
    vertical-align: top;
  }

  .popup-k{
    color: var(--red);
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.68rem;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    padding-right: 0.55rem;
    white-space: nowrap;
    font-weight: 700;
  }

  .popup-v{
    color: var(--ink);
  }

  .popup-link{
    display: inline-flex;
    margin-top: 0.65rem;
    padding: 0.48rem 0.74rem;
    border-radius: 999px;
    background: var(--red);
    color: #fff !important;
    text-decoration: none !important;
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.68rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .popup-link:hover{
    background: var(--green-dark);
  }

  .map-legend{
    padding: 0.75rem 0.85rem;
  }

  .map-legend .legend-title{
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--red);
    margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
  }

  .map-legend .legend-row{
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    font-size: 0.92rem;
    color: var(--ink);
    margin-top: 0.25rem;
  }

  .map-legend .dot{
    width: 11px;
    height: 11px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: inline-block;
    background: var(--red);
    border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.95);
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.20);
  }

  .map-legend .line{
    width: 18px;
    height: 0;
    display: inline-block;
    border-top: 3px solid var(--ochre);
  }

  /* CARDS DAS EXPEDIÇÕES */

  .expedition-grid{
    display: grid;
    gap: 1.5rem;
  }

  .expedition-card{
    scroll-margin-top: 7rem;
    background: rgba(255,253,247,0.92);
    border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.20);
    border-left: 5px solid var(--green);
    border-radius: 16px;
    padding: 1.25rem;
    transition: box-shadow 0.3s ease, transform 0.3s ease, border-color 0.3s ease;
  }

  .expedition-card.is-highlighted{
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(217,154,39,0.24), 0 16px 34px rgba(0,0,0,0.14);
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    border-left-color: var(--ochre);
  }

  .expedition-eyebrow{
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    color: var(--red);
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.09em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
  }

  .expedition-card h3{
    font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
    color: var(--green-dark);
    font-size: clamp(1.25rem, 2vw, 1.65rem);
    font-weight: 800;
    margin: 0 0 0.65rem 0;
  }

  .expedition-meta{
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 0.55rem;
    margin-bottom: 0.95rem;
  }

  .meta-pill{
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    border-radius: 999px;
    border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.26);
    background: rgba(246,241,232,0.84);
    color: var(--green-dark);
    padding: 0.30rem 0.65rem;
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.68rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .expedition-summary{
    margin-bottom: 1rem !important;
    color: var(--ink) !important;
  }

  .exp-carousel{
    display: flex;
    gap: 1rem;
    overflow-x: auto;
    scroll-snap-type: x mandatory;
    padding: 0.25rem 0.2rem 0.9rem 0.2rem;
  }

  .exp-carousel figure{
    flex: 0 0 min(420px, 82vw);
    margin: 0;
    scroll-snap-align: start;
  }

  .exp-carousel img{
    width: 100%;
    height: 250px;
    object-fit: cover;
    display: block;
    border-radius: 13px;
    box-shadow: 0 10px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.16);
    border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.22);
  }

  .exp-carousel figcaption{
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.68rem;
    color: var(--muted);
    margin-top: 0.35rem;
  }

  .empty-gallery{
    padding: 1rem;
    border-radius: 12px;
    background:
      linear-gradient(rgba(98,106,56,0.12), rgba(98,106,56,0.12)),
      url("../figures/tsiino_bg.png");
    background-size: 420px auto;
    border: 1px dashed rgba(217,154,39,0.60);
    color: var(--green-dark);
    font-size: 0.92rem;
  }

  @media (max-width: 991.98px){
    .page-hero{
      min-height: 100vh;
    }

    .page-hero-logo{
      top: 4.9rem;
      left: 0.75rem;
      width: 78px;
    }

    .page-hero-content{
      top: 11.4rem;
      left: 0.75rem;
      width: calc(100% - 1.5rem);
    }

    #quarto-header .navbar-collapse.show,
    #quarto-header .navbar-collapse.collapsing{
      margin-top: 0.6rem;
      padding: 0.85rem 1rem;
      width: min(280px, calc(100vw - 2rem));
      background: rgba(23, 23, 23, 0.72) !important;
      border: 1px solid rgba(246, 241, 232, 0.22);
      border-radius: 18px;
      box-shadow: 0 14px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.28);
      backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
      -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
    }

    #quarto-header .navbar-collapse.show .nav-link,
    #quarto-header .navbar-collapse.collapsing .nav-link{
      color: #F6F1E8 !important;
      font-weight: 600;
      padding: 0.45rem 0.25rem;
      text-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9);
    }

    #quarto-header .navbar-collapse.show .nav-link:hover,
    #quarto-header .navbar-collapse.show .nav-link.active-section{
      color: var(--ochre) !important;
    }

    .content-card{
      width: calc(100vw - 1rem);
      padding: 1.35rem 1rem;
    }

    .section-title{
      grid-template-columns: 56px 1fr;
    }

    .bg-window{
      height: 2rem;
    }

    .map-logo{
      width: 104px;
    }

    .exp-carousel img{
      height: 205px;
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 520px){
    .page-hero-logo{
      display: none;
    }

    .page-hero-content h1{
      font-size: clamp(2.8rem, 15vw, 4.2rem);
    }

    .hero-actions{
      gap: 0.45rem;
    }

    .btn-main,
    .btn-ghost{
      width: 100%;
    }
  }
</style>

<script>
  window.scrollToExpedition = function(id){
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    if(!el) return false;

    el.scrollIntoView({behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start'});

    document.querySelectorAll('.expedition-card').forEach(card => {
      card.classList.remove('is-highlighted');
    });

    el.classList.add('is-highlighted');

    setTimeout(() => {
      el.classList.remove('is-highlighted');
    }, 2600);

    return false;
  };

  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function(){
    if(window.location.hash){
      const id = window.location.hash.replace('#', '');
      setTimeout(() => window.scrollToExpedition(id), 350);
    }
  });
</script>
```

```{=html}
<section class="page-hero page-hero-expeditions" aria-label="Abertura da página de expedições" data-i18n-aria="expeditions.hero.aria">
  <div class="page-hero-overlay"></div>

  <div class="page-hero-logo" aria-label="Logo Tsiino Hiiwiida" data-i18n-aria="expeditions.hero.logoAria">
    <img
      src="../figures/logo_tsiino.png"
      alt="Logo Tsiino Hiiwiida" data-i18n-alt="expeditions.hero.logoAlt"
      onerror="this.style.display='none';"
    >
  </div>

  <div class="page-hero-content">
    <div class="hero-kicker" data-i18n="expeditions.hero.kicker">Expedições · Alto Rio Negro</div>
    <h1 data-i18n="expeditions.hero.title">Expedições</h1>
    <p class="hero-subtitle" data-i18n="expeditions.hero.subtitle">Mapa, pontos de coleta, fotos e registros de campo</p>
    <p class="hero-description" data-i18n="expeditions.hero.description">
      Acompanhe as campanhas do projeto Tsiino Hiiwiida na região da Cabeça do Cachorro, em São Gabriel da Cachoeira.
    </p>

    <div class="hero-actions">
      <a class="btn-main" href="#mapa-expedicoes" data-i18n="expeditions.hero.mapButton">Ver mapa</a>
      <a class="btn-ghost" href="#lista-expedicoes" data-i18n="expeditions.hero.listButton">Ver expedições</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<section id="mapa-expedicoes" class="content-card">
  <div class="section-title">
    <h2 data-i18n="expeditions.map.title">Mapa das expedições</h2>
  </div>

  <p class="lead" data-i18n-html="expeditions.map.lead">
    Expedições do projeto <strong>Tsiino Hiiwiida</strong> na região da Cabeça do Cachorro, em São Gabriel da Cachoeira.
  </p>

  <p data-i18n="expeditions.map.description">
    O mapa apresenta o limite municipal de São Gabriel da Cachoeira como referência territorial da região da Cabeça do Cachorro e os pontos associados às expedições realizadas.
  </p>
```

```{r mapa-expedicoes}
library(leaflet)
library(htmlwidgets)
library(dplyr)
library(htmltools)
library(sf)

# -------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 1) Input principal das expedições
# -------------------------------------------------------------------------

csv_path <- find_up(file.path("_input_data", "../_input_data/expedicoes_tsiino.csv"))

if (is.na(csv_path)) {
  stop(
    "Não encontrei o arquivo '../_input_data/expedicoes_tsiino.csv'.\n",
    "Diretório de trabalho (getwd): ", getwd(), "\n",
    "Crie a pasta '_input_data' no projeto e salve ali a tabela com os pontos das expedições."
  )
}

input_dir_abs <- dirname(csv_path)

expedicoes_raw <- read.csv(
  csv_path,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
  check.names = FALSE,
  fileEncoding = "UTF-8-BOM",
  na.strings = c("", "NA", "NaN")
)

lat_col <- pick_col(
  expedicoes_raw,
  c("latitude", "Latitude", "lat", "Lat", "LAT", "decimalLatitude", "decimal_latitude", "y", "Y"),
  label = "latitude"
)

lon_col <- pick_col(
  expedicoes_raw,
  c("longitude", "Longitude", "lon", "Lon", "long", "Long", "LONG", "lng", "Lng", "decimalLongitude", "decimal_longitude", "x", "X"),
  label = "longitude"
)

id_col <- pick_col(expedicoes_raw, c("expedicao_id", "expedição_id", "id", "ID", "slug", "codigo", "código"), required = FALSE)
exp_col <- pick_col(expedicoes_raw, c("expedicao", "expedição", "Expedicao", "Expedição", "expedition", "nome", "name"), required = FALSE)
loc_col <- pick_col(expedicoes_raw, c("localidade", "local", "Localidade", "Local", "site", "ponto", "Ponto", "locality"), required = FALSE)
date_col <- pick_col(expedicoes_raw, c("data", "date", "Data", "Date", "periodo", "período", "Periodo"), required = FALSE)
comm_col <- pick_col(expedicoes_raw, c("comunidade", "Comunidade", "community", "aldeia", "Aldeia"), required = FALSE)
mun_col <- pick_col(expedicoes_raw, c("municipio", "município", "Municipio", "Município", "city", "cidade"), required = FALSE)
team_col <- pick_col(expedicoes_raw, c("equipe", "Equipe", "team", "pesquisadores", "coletores", "collectors"), required = FALSE)
obs_col <- pick_col(expedicoes_raw, c("observacoes", "observações", "obs", "Obs", "notes", "Notas", "comentarios", "comentários"), required = FALSE)
summary_col <- pick_col(expedicoes_raw, c("resumo", "Resumo", "descricao", "descrição", "Description", "description"), required = FALSE)
photo_col <- pick_col(expedicoes_raw, c("pasta_fotos", "fotos", "folder", "photo_folder", "pasta", "imagens"), required = FALSE)

get_or_na <- function(data, col) {
  if (is.na(col)) return(rep(NA_character_, nrow(data)))
  as.character(data[[col]])
}

expedicoes <- data.frame(
  latitude = to_num(expedicoes_raw[[lat_col]]),
  longitude = to_num(expedicoes_raw[[lon_col]]),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

expedicoes$expedicao <- get_or_na(expedicoes_raw, exp_col)
expedicoes$localidade <- get_or_na(expedicoes_raw, loc_col)
expedicoes$data_exp <- get_or_na(expedicoes_raw, date_col)
expedicoes$comunidade <- get_or_na(expedicoes_raw, comm_col)
expedicoes$municipio <- get_or_na(expedicoes_raw, mun_col)
expedicoes$equipe <- get_or_na(expedicoes_raw, team_col)
expedicoes$observacoes <- get_or_na(expedicoes_raw, obs_col)
expedicoes$resumo <- get_or_na(expedicoes_raw, summary_col)
expedicoes$pasta_fotos <- get_or_na(expedicoes_raw, photo_col)
expedicoes$input_id <- get_or_na(expedicoes_raw, id_col)

expedicoes$expedicao[!nz(expedicoes$expedicao)] <- paste0("Expedição ", which(!nz(expedicoes$expedicao)))

expedicoes$expedicao_id <- expedicoes$input_id
expedicoes$expedicao_id[!nz(expedicoes$expedicao_id)] <- slugify(expedicoes$expedicao[!nz(expedicoes$expedicao_id)])
expedicoes$expedicao_id <- slugify(expedicoes$expedicao_id)

expedicoes$section_id <- paste0("exp-", expedicoes$expedicao_id)

expedicoes$pasta_fotos[!nz(expedicoes$pasta_fotos)] <- expedicoes$expedicao_id[!nz(expedicoes$pasta_fotos)]

expedicoes$longitude <- ifelse(
  !is.na(expedicoes$longitude) & expedicoes$longitude > 0 & expedicoes$longitude <= 80,
  -expedicoes$longitude,
  expedicoes$longitude
)

expedicoes$has_coords <- !is.na(expedicoes$latitude) & !is.na(expedicoes$longitude)

expedicoes_pontos <- expedicoes[expedicoes$has_coords, , drop = FALSE]

# -------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 2) Limite municipal de São Gabriel da Cachoeira
# -------------------------------------------------------------------------

limite_rel <- file.path(
  "_input_data",
  "limites",
  "sao_gabriel_da_cachoeira.geojson"
)

limite_path <- find_up(limite_rel)
municipio_sf <- NULL

if (!is.na(limite_path) && file.exists(limite_path)) {
  municipio_sf <- tryCatch({
    x <- sf::st_read(limite_path, quiet = TRUE)
    x <- sf::st_transform(x, 4326)
    x <- sf::st_make_valid(x)
    x
  }, error = function(e) {
    warning(
      "Encontrei o arquivo, mas não consegui ler o limite municipal:\n",
      limite_path, "\n",
      conditionMessage(e)
    )
    NULL
  })
}

if (is.null(municipio_sf) && requireNamespace("geobr", quietly = TRUE)) {
  limite_dir_abs <- file.path(input_dir_abs, "limites")
  dir.create(limite_dir_abs, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

  limite_path_new <- file.path(
    limite_dir_abs,
    "sao_gabriel_da_cachoeira.geojson"
  )

  municipio_sf <- tryCatch({
    x <- geobr::read_municipality(
      code_muni = 1303809,
      year = 2020,
      simplified = TRUE,
      showProgress = FALSE
    )

    x <- sf::st_transform(x, 4326)
    x <- sf::st_make_valid(x)

    sf::st_write(
      x,
      limite_path_new,
      delete_dsn = TRUE,
      quiet = TRUE
    )

    x
  }, error = function(e) {
    warning(
      "Não consegui baixar/salvar o limite municipal pelo geobr:\n",
      conditionMessage(e)
    )
    NULL
  })
}

if (!is.null(municipio_sf)) {
  municipio_sf <- sf::st_transform(municipio_sf, 4326)
  municipio_bbox <- sf::st_bbox(municipio_sf)
  municipio_label_pt <- suppressWarnings(
    sf::st_point_on_surface(sf::st_geometry(municipio_sf))
  )
  municipio_label_xy <- sf::st_coordinates(municipio_label_pt)[1, ]
}
# -------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 3) Popup dos pontos
# -------------------------------------------------------------------------

popup_html <- character(0)

if (nrow(expedicoes_pontos) > 0) {
  title_popup <- ifelse(
    nz(expedicoes_pontos$localidade),
    expedicoes_pontos$localidade,
    expedicoes_pontos$expedicao
  )

  popup_html <- paste0(
    "<div class='popup-card'>",
    "<div class='popup-title'>", safe_html(title_popup), "</div>",
    "<div class='popup-sub' data-i18n='expeditions.popup.kicker'>Expedição · Tsiino Hiiwiida</div>",
    "<table class='popup-table'>",
    "<tr><td class='popup-k' data-i18n='common.name'>Nome</td><td class='popup-v'>", safe_html(expedicoes_pontos$expedicao), "</td></tr>",
    "<tr><td class='popup-k' data-i18n='common.date'>Data</td><td class='popup-v'>", safe_html(expedicoes_pontos$data_exp), "</td></tr>",
    "<tr><td class='popup-k' data-i18n='common.community'>Comunidade</td><td class='popup-v'>", safe_html(expedicoes_pontos$comunidade), "</td></tr>",
    "<tr><td class='popup-k' data-i18n='common.municipality'>Município</td><td class='popup-v'>", safe_html(expedicoes_pontos$municipio), "</td></tr>",
    "<tr><td class='popup-k' data-i18n='common.team'>Equipe</td><td class='popup-v'>", safe_html(expedicoes_pontos$equipe), "</td></tr>",
    "<tr><td class='popup-k'>Lat/Lon</td><td class='popup-v'>", round(expedicoes_pontos$latitude, 5), ", ", round(expedicoes_pontos$longitude, 5), "</td></tr>",
    "</table>",
    "<a class='popup-link' href='#", expedicoes_pontos$section_id, "' onclick=\"return scrollToExpedition('", expedicoes_pontos$section_id, "')\" data-i18n='expeditions.popup.photosDetails'>Ver fotos e detalhes</a>",
    "</div>"
  )
}

exp_levels <- unique(ifelse(nz(expedicoes_pontos$expedicao), expedicoes_pontos$expedicao, "Expedição"))

palette_colors <- c(
  "#A93632",
  "#59602F",
  "#D99A27",
  "#626A38",
  "#6B4E9B",
  "#2F6F83",
  "#C46A2A",
  "#8A3D3B"
)

exp_color <- setNames(
  rep(palette_colors, length.out = max(1, length(exp_levels))),
  exp_levels
)

if (nrow(expedicoes_pontos) > 0) {
  expedicoes_pontos$marker_color <- exp_color[
    ifelse(nz(expedicoes_pontos$expedicao), expedicoes_pontos$expedicao, "Expedição")
  ]
}

# -------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 4) Mapa
# -------------------------------------------------------------------------

logo_src <- if (exists("logo_map_uri") && nzchar(logo_map_uri)) {
  logo_map_uri
} else {
  "../figures/brand/logo_tsiino_symbol.png"
}

map <- leaflet(
  width = "100%",
  height = 740,
  options = leafletOptions(minZoom = 3, maxZoom = 22)
) %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$Esri.WorldImagery, group = "Satélite") %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$OpenStreetMap, group = "OSM") %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$Esri.WorldStreetMap, group = "ESRI Street") %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$OpenTopoMap, group = "OpenTopo") %>%
  addControl(
    html = paste0(
      "<div class='map-logo'>",
      "<img data-i18n-alt='expeditions.map.logoAlt' src='", logo_src, "' alt='Logo Tsiino Hiiwiida'>",
      "</div>"
    ),
    position = "topright",
    className = "map-logo-control"
  ) %>%
  addControl(
    html = paste0(
      "<div style='text-align:left; line-height:1.22; padding:7px 10px;",
      "background:rgba(250,246,238,0.93); border-radius:10px;",
      "box-shadow:0 1px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.22);'>",
      "<div style='font-size:18px; font-weight:800; color:#203B23;'>", htmlEscape("Tsiino Hiiwiida"), "</div>",
      "<div style='font-size:12px; font-weight:600; color:#A94F35;'>", htmlEscape("Expedições · Cabeça do Cachorro"), "</div>",
      "</div>"
    ),
    position = "topleft",
    className = "custom-title"
  )

if (!is.null(municipio_sf)) {
  map <- map %>%
    addPolygons(
      data = municipio_sf,
      group = "São Gabriel da Cachoeira",
      color = "#D99A27",
      weight = 2,
      opacity = 1,
      fillColor = "#59602F",
      fillOpacity = 0.10,
      label = "São Gabriel da Cachoeira (AM)",
      popup = "<strong>São Gabriel da Cachoeira (AM)</strong><br><span data-i18n='expeditions.map.municipalityPopup'>Município usado como referência cartográfica para a região da Cabeça do Cachorro.</span>"
    ) %>%
    addLabelOnlyMarkers(
      lng = municipio_label_xy[1],
      lat = municipio_label_xy[2],
      label = "São Gabriel da Cachoeira",
      labelOptions = labelOptions(
        noHide = TRUE,
        direction = "center",
        textOnly = TRUE,
        style = list(
          "font-weight" = "800",
          "font-size" = "14px",
          "color" = "#FAF6EE",
          "text-shadow" = "0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.9)"
        )
      )
    ) %>%
    fitBounds(
      lng1 = as.numeric(municipio_bbox["xmin"]),
      lat1 = as.numeric(municipio_bbox["ymin"]),
      lng2 = as.numeric(municipio_bbox["xmax"]),
      lat2 = as.numeric(municipio_bbox["ymax"])
    )
} else {
  map <- map %>%
    setView(lng = -67.09, lat = -0.13, zoom = 7)
}

if (nrow(expedicoes_pontos) > 0) {
  map <- map %>%
    addCircleMarkers(
      data = expedicoes_pontos,
      lng = ~longitude,
      lat = ~latitude,
      radius = 7,
      color = ~marker_color,
      fillColor = ~marker_color,
      fillOpacity = 0.90,
      opacity = 1,
      weight = 2,
      group = "Expedições",
      popup = popup_html,
      label = ~paste0(ifelse(nz(localidade), localidade, expedicao), " · ", data_exp),
      labelOptions = labelOptions(direction = "auto", textsize = "12px", opacity = 0.92)
    )
} else {
  map <- map %>%
    addControl(
      html = "<div style='padding:8px 10px; max-width:260px;' data-i18n='expeditions.map.noValidPoints'>Nenhum ponto com latitude e longitude válidas foi encontrado no CSV.</div>",
      position = "bottomright"
    )
}

map <- map %>%
  addLayersControl(
    baseGroups = c("Satélite", "OSM", "ESRI Street", "OpenTopo"),
    overlayGroups = c("São Gabriel da Cachoeira", "Expedições"),
    position = "bottomleft",
    options = layersControlOptions(collapsed = TRUE, autoZIndex = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  addControl(
    html = paste0(
      "<div class='map-legend'>",
      "<div class='legend-title' data-i18n='expeditions.map.legend'>Legenda</div>",
      "<div class='legend-row'><span class='line'></span><span data-i18n='expeditions.map.sgc'>São Gabriel da Cachoeira</span></div>",
      "<div class='legend-row'><span class='dot'></span><span data-i18n='expeditions.map.registeredExpeditions'>Expedições cadastradas</span></div>",
      "<div class='legend-row' style='font-size:0.78rem;color:#5D574C;'>n = ", nrow(expedicoes_pontos), " ponto(s)</div>",
      "</div>"
    ),
    position = "bottomright",
    className = "map-legend-control"
  )

map
```

```{=html}
</section>

<div class="bg-window"></div>

<section id="lista-expedicoes" class="content-card">
  <div class="section-title">
    <h2 data-i18n="expeditions.list.title">Expedições</h2>
  </div>
```

```{r expedition-sections}
library(htmltools)

photo_root_fs_rel <- file.path("_input_data", "expedicoes_fotos")
photo_root_html_rel <- file.path("..", "_input_data", "expedicoes_fotos")
photo_root_abs <- find_up(photo_root_fs_rel)

get_photos <- function(folder) {
  if (is.na(photo_root_abs) || is.na(folder) || !nzchar(trimws(folder))) {
    return(character())
  }

  d <- file.path(photo_root_abs, folder)

  if (!dir.exists(d)) {
    return(character())
  }

  f <- list.files(
    d,
    pattern = "\\.(jpg|jpeg|png|webp)$",
    full.names = FALSE,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  )

  f <- f[!grepl("^\\.", f)]

  if (length(f) == 0) {
    return(character())
  }

  gsub("\\\\", "/", file.path(photo_root_html_rel, folder, f))
}

make_meta <- function(label, value, key = NULL) {
  if (!nz(value)) return(NULL)

  if (!is.null(key) && nzchar(key)) {
    tags$span(
      class = "meta-pill",
      tags$span(`data-i18n` = key, label),
      ": ",
      value
    )
  } else {
    tags$span(
      class = "meta-pill",
      paste0(label, ": ", value)
    )
  }
}

make_exp_card <- function(i) {
  x <- expedicoes[i, , drop = FALSE]

  photos <- get_photos(x$pasta_fotos)

  title <- ifelse(
    nz(x$expedicao),
    x$expedicao,
    paste0("Expedição ", i)
  )

  summary_txt <- ifelse(
    nz(x$resumo),
    x$resumo,
    x$observacoes
  )

  gallery <- if (length(photos) > 0) {
    tags$div(
      class = "exp-carousel",
      lapply(seq_along(photos), function(j) {
        tags$figure(
          tags$img(
            src = photos[j],
            alt = paste(title, "foto", j),
            loading = "lazy",
            decoding = "async"
          ),
          tags$figcaption(
            tagList(tags$span(`data-i18n` = "common.photo", "Foto"), " ", j, " · ", title)
          )
        )
      })
    )
  } else {
    tags$div(
      class = "empty-gallery",
      tagList(
        tags$span(`data-i18n` = "expeditions.card.noPhoto", "Nenhuma foto encontrada para esta expedição."),
        " ",
        tags$span(`data-i18n` = "expeditions.card.expectedFolder", "Pasta esperada:"),
        " _input_data/expedicoes_fotos/",
        x$pasta_fotos
      )
    )
  }

  tags$section(
    class = "expedition-card",
    id = x$section_id,
    tags$div(class = "expedition-eyebrow", `data-i18n` = "expeditions.card.eyebrow", "Expedição"),
    tags$h3(title),
    tags$div(
      class = "expedition-meta",
      make_meta("Data", x$data_exp, "common.date"),
      make_meta("Localidade", x$localidade, "common.locality"),
      make_meta("Comunidade", x$comunidade, "common.community"),
      make_meta("Município", x$municipio, "common.municipality"),
      make_meta("Equipe", x$equipe, "common.team")
    ),
    if (nz(summary_txt)) {
      tags$p(class = "expedition-summary", summary_txt)
    },
    gallery
  )
}

if (nrow(expedicoes) > 0) {
  tagList(
    tags$div(
      class = "expedition-grid",
      lapply(seq_len(nrow(expedicoes)), make_exp_card)
    )
  )
} else {
  tags$p(`data-i18n` = "expeditions.list.empty", "Nenhuma expedição cadastrada.")
}
```

```{=html}
</section>
```
